positive: A detailed, stylized illustration of a whimsical celestial forest scene. The composition should be symmetrical and centered, featuring a cluster of ancient, glowing, bioluminescent trees with swirling, nebula-like leaves. Integrate subtle motifs of cosmic dust, stylized crescent moons, and meandering river currents flowing with starlight. The overall palette should be deep indigo, ethereal sapphire, and brilliant cyan, accented by soft gold glow highlights. Style should mimic vintage psychedelic etching art mixed with modern vector geometry, ensuring sharp lines and clean silhouettes. The mood is magical and serene. Highly detailed, perfect for screen printing, clean edges, high contrast.
